welcome_series_1.name: Welcome to Your Wellness Journey
welcome_series_1.subject: Welcome to {{clinic_name}}, {{name}}! 🌿
welcome_series_1.html:
Namaste, {{name}}!

Welcome to the {{clinic_name}} family. We're honored to be part of your wellness journey.

What to Expect

Ayurveda is not a quick fix — it's a lifelong partnership between you and your body. Our team will guide you through personalized treatments based on your unique Prakriti (constitution).

Your Next Steps

  • Complete your Prakriti Assessment
  • Explore our treatment options
  • Follow us on Instagram for daily wellness tips

Wishing you balance and vitality,
Team {{clinic_name}}

review_request.html:
